columns.extraction_plan: The abstract on page 1 states: 'Patients with metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer were randomly assigned to darolutamide or placebo plus androgen-deprivation therapy and docetaxel.' The introduction on page 1 further clarifies: 'In ARASENS, patients with metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer were randomly assigned to double-blind treatment with either darolutamide or placebo, in combination with ADT and docetaxel.' Therefore, the add-on treatment is Darolutamide.
